overview: SliceRush is a Domino's-inspired food delivery platform with a Pinterest-style card UI. Customers browse a fully customizable menu, manage a cart with smart coupons, track orders in real time, and pay via Stripe. Delivery partners accept and manage their deliveries through a dedicated portal. Admins control the full platform from a comprehensive dashboard.
features: Internet Identity login with customer and delivery partner roles
Pinterest-style menu with category filtering and real-time product search
Full product customization — size, crust, and add-ons with live price updates
Smart cart with BOGO coupons and auto-apply best discount logic
Address management with distance-based delivery fee calculation
Order tracking with automatic status polling
Delivery partner portal — accept, reject, and update assigned orders
Full admin panel — dashboard KPIs, product CRUD, coupon management, order management, and user management
